PostToolUse.description: Auto-capture explicit memory events from tool use

Stop.command: .venv/bin/python3 memory_manager.py prune 2>/dev/null; .venv/bin/python3 memory_manager.py dump --out CODEX_CONTEXT.md 2>/dev/null || true
Stop.description: Session end: prune duplicates + regenerate CODEX_CONTEXT.md
